title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Kaido, Unknown person #3, Tama as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Law Gathering his wits in front of a byobu folding screen depicting a tiger".".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You managed to coat your blows with CONQUEOR'S HAK!...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What was it again? "Gomu Gomu no..."?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: announce the outcome of my battle throughout onigashima.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Young Master Yamato has been spotted...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait... What happened to the shackles?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THAT'S RIGHT! I'M NOT A PRISON ANYMORE!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 30 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
